title: Quality Assurance Associate
description:
Role summary

As a Software QA Engineer, first, you should understand the art of being human.

You will be responsible for assisting in the plan & execution of our software quality

assurance process, ensuring that our products meet the highest standards of

reliability, usability, and performance. You will be working closely with development,

product, and QA team members to test, identify, and help resolve software issues.

Job Description:

  • Understand business functions and analyse user requirements,
  • Identify the scope of project requirements and build consensus with all business stakeholders.
  • Develop, maintain, and execute automated test scripts using Selenium (Java).
  • Design and implement automated testing pipelines for continuous integration and delivery.
  • Analysis, scoping of data, functional requirement & specification, application design and obtain user requirements
  • Conduct functional, regression, and UI testing across browsers and devices.
  • Perform root cause analysis of defects and suggest preventive measures.
  • Prepare QA documents & checklist to facilitate and deliver the project.
  • Continuously improve testing strategies and QA documentation.
  • Bonus: Design Load test for performance testing
  • Bonus: Infrastructure (AWS) knowledge

Requirements:

Eagerness to Learn: Motivated to understand the purpose of product design and feature value, think from a human perspective to ensure the development & engineering is fit for market use.

User Centric: Sensitive to user behavior, user flow for digital products (Webapps)

Attention to Detail: Sensitive to the use case and able to spot anomalies, with a proactive approach to identifying potential issues.

Communication Skills: Ability to communicate with internal and external; ability to clearly document and explain issues in detail, with effective communication skills for collaboration (team player).

Technical Skills: Software development knowledge & skill QA testing processes. Proficiency in Selenium with Java (TestNG or JUnit preferred). Postman Jenkin

Preferred addition:

Being human

Knowledge of automated testing tools (minimum Selenium,Postman),

Familiarity with Agile or Scrum methodologies.

Basic communication with English (Read, Write, Listen & Perceive)

postedCompany.description: Cynopsis Solutions is a winner of MAS FinTech Award 2018. It is also named as a RegTech100 company in 2018 and 2019.  Having founded in 2014 and headquartered in Singapore, we focus on anti-money laundering and counter terrorism financing SaaS products that automate the manual processes and digitise the analogue records and documentation for our clients. The unique proposition of combining our deep regulatory and Compliance expertise with smart use of functional technologies allows us to offer very cost effective solutions to banks, financial institutions, professional services companies as well as FinTech and blockchain start-ups.
postedCompany.name: CYNOPSIS SOLUTIONS PTE. LTD.
